title: PreparedStatement.setFetchSize(0) causes ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt64 NOT NULL, name String, age Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, age) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 30);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, age) VALUES (2, 'Bob', NULL);
SELECT MAX(age) FROM test_table WHERE name IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, name FROM test_table WHERE age = (SELECT MAX(age) FROM test_table);
